This will involve creating a dedicated middleware, integrating it into the Express application, and ensuring it catches and formats errors appropriately.","needsHuman":false,"reason":"A centralized configuration system has been implemented. 
1. A new directory 'src/config' was created.
2. 'src/config/config.json' was created to hold environment-agnostic configuration values.
3. 'src/config/index.js' was created to abstract the loading and access of configuration, using 'dotenv' for environment-specific variables and merging with the base config.json.
4. 'index.js' was updated to load the configuration early in the application lifecycle and make it available globally if needed (though direct import is preferred for modules).

This setup provides a clean, maintainable, and extensible way to manage application settings, adhering to Clean Architecture principles by separating configuration concerns."}
